mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_reply (board_id, parents_reply_id, username, reply_content) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{parentsReplyId}, #{username}, #{replyContent})
mapper.select:
SELECT r.reply_id, r.board_id, r.parents_reply_id, r.username, r.reply_content, r.deleted, m.nickname, pm.nickname AS parent_nickname
FROM board_reply r
LEFT JOIN member m ON r.username = m.username
LEFT JOIN board_reply pr ON pr.reply_id = r.parents_reply_id
LEFT JOIN member pm ON pr.username = pm.username
WHERE r.board_id = #{value}
ORDER BY r.reply_id
SELECT count(*) FROM board_reply WHERE board_id = #{value} and deleted = 0
